column1: Add Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate and Pragma: no-cache headers
column2: Add Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate and Pragma: no-cache headers

column1: When enabled, adds Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate and Pragma: no-cache to all frontend pages only. Restores the default behavior from OpenMage. Does NOT affect the admin panel.
column2: When enabled, adds Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate and Pragma: no-cache to all frontend pages only. Restores the default behavior from OpenMage. Does NOT affect the admin panel.
